use proptest::prelude::*;

fn parse_json(input: &str) -> Result<serde_json::Value, serde_json::Error> {
    serde_json::from_str(input)
}

proptest! {
    // GOOD: bounded string strategy with size cap
    #[test]
    fn test_parse_roundtrip(input in "[a-zA-Z0-9 ,.]{0,1024}") {
        let result = parse_json(&input);
        // Controlled input size
    }

    // GOOD: bounded vec strategy
    #[test]
    fn test_process_items(items in vec(any::<u64>(), 0..1000)) {
        let sum: u64 = items.iter().sum();
        prop_assert!(sum >= 0);
    }
}
